project.name: osdcloud-win11-deployment-lab
project.current_goal: Repeatable Web-console-first OSDCloud/iPXE deployment flow for Windows 11 Pro 25H2 zh-TW.

development.purpose: Active checkout for code, docs, tests, commits, pushes, and deployment-facing validation.

deployment_clone.purpose: Current production-like checkout; old C:\Users\Davis\Documents\New project path is retired for new work.

runtime.purpose: Product-managed OSDCloud runtime/install root created or updated only by the normal deployment workflow.

development.summary: Initialization Wizard Prepare runtime artifact rows show explicit MISSING/BLOCKED status badges with stronger red/orange row styling.

repo_only.policy: Do not use repo-only as the primary remote or a new development starting point.

deployment_clone.required_update_before_tests: This active checkout is already the deployment-facing path; from any other clone, run git pull --ff-only origin master before tests.

runtime.allowed_mutation_path: Normal product workflow such as Web Runtime Readiness, Prepare runtime, endpoint sync, preflight, and deployment tests.

git.source_of_truth: Live Git state is authoritative; this tracked status file records workflow context and may not self-reference the commit that contains it.

before_development_work: Only run git pull --ff-only origin master when the worktree is clean and current remote state is required or explicitly requested.
after_development_push_before_tests: confirm this active checkout HEAD equals the pushed origin/master commit
forbidden: Do not use C:\Users\Davis\Documents\New project for new work.
Do not manually patch, copy into, or directly edit C:\OSDCloud.
Do not commit generated deployment artifacts or local secrets.
